User.title: User
User.description: Represents an individual user within the Batang Techno application, primarily for administrative and judging roles. Authentication details are managed externally.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

externalAuthId.description: Reference to the unique identifier from the external authentication system used to identify this user.

email.description: Email address of the user, primarily used for communication and identification.

name.description: Full name of the user for display purposes.

role.description: The assigned role of the user within the application (e.g., 'admin', 'judge').

judgedEntries.description: Array of entry IDs the judge has evaluated.

projectManagementNomination.description: The entry ID nominated for the Ask Lex PH Academy Award (exclusive to specific judge).

Challenge.title: Challenge
Challenge.description: Defines the thematic categories or challenges that hackathon entries can belong to.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Challenge entity.

name.description: The official name of the hackathon challenge category (e.g., 'SMART MOBILITY AND TRANSPORTATION').

description.description: A detailed explanation or scope of what the challenge entails.

ProgrammingWinner.title: ProgrammingWinner
ProgrammingWinner.description: Represents a winner of the programming challenge.

Entry.title: Entry
Entry.description: Represents a submitted hackathon entry or project by a team.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Entry entity.

projectName.description: The official name of the hackathon project.

teamName.description: The name of the team that submitted this entry.

projectMembers.description: A list of individual members of the project team, including their school details.

googleDriveVideoLink.description: A Google Drive link to the project's video presentation.

githubLink.description: A link to the project's GitHub repository.

thumbnailImageUrl.description: A URL to an image file used as a thumbnail.

pitchDeckLink.description: A URL to the finalist pitch deck.

projectDescription.description: A comprehensive description of the hackathon project.

submissionDate.description: The date and time when the entry was officially submitted.

adminApproved.description: Indicates if an admin has approved the entry.

top10Published.description: Indicates if the entry is part of the published Top 12 finalists.

top3Published.description: Indicates if the entry is part of the published Top 3 winners.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user.

params.name: adminId
params.description: The unique ID of the administrator.

params.name: judgeId
params.description: The unique ID of the judge.

params.name: challengeId
params.description: The unique ID of the challenge.

definition.description: Stores winners of the programming challenge.

params.name: winnerId
params.description: The unique ID of the winner.

params.name: entryId
params.description: The unique ID of the hackathon entry.
